name: Video Content Repurposing Planner
description: Analyzes YouTube video pages via Firecrawl scraping, uses Claude AI to identify the best clip-worthy moments for short-form repurposing, and saves a detailed repurposing plan to Google Sheets with a summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's YouTube-to-Shorts with Klap workflow.

source.originalName: Convert YouTube videos to shorts with Klap & auto-post to multiple social platforms

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for scraping YouTube pages

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving repurposing plan

videoUrls.description: Comma-separated YouTube video URLs to analyze for repurposing

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the repurposing plan

steps.name: Scrape YouTube video pages with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for video repurposing analysis
Run Claude AI video repurposing analysis
Build Sheets rows from repurposing plan
Save repurposing plan to Google Sheets
